about.title: About Me
about.p1: With over 5 years of experience as a full-stack developer, I specialize in building scalable architectures and optimizing performance, with a strong focus on frontend technologies.
about.p2: I am passionate about solving complex technical challenges and mentoring developers to align technical execution with business outcomes. My goal is to create applications that enhance user experience and efficiency through collaborative leadership and innovative problem-solving.

chat.initial_message: Hi! I'm Burak's AI assistant. Ask me anything about his experience or skills!
